content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1592: The battle on the glacier

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

Ni Cang Tian

The Snow Tribe lived in the All-cold Snow Territory, the coldest place in the Sea Domain of Nihility. The entire territory was frozen year-round.

The All-cold Snow Territory was the sources of strong, cold gusts blowing through the Sea Domain of Nihility for billions of years. It was bitterly cold and harsh; even the warriors cultivating Ice power Upanishad didn’t dare to visit this place regularly. The Snow Tribe was born in the All-cold Snow Territory, so they were born immune to coldness, and were also geniuses in cultivating the Ice Power Upanishad.

Ten thousand years ago, a member of the Snow Tribe in All-cold Snow Territory had reached the Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm, immediately making the Snow Tribe famous.

He left the All-cold Snow Territory to visit the hustling-bustling lands around the Sea Domain of Nihility. Wherever he traveled, the world was frozen. He had brought many troubles to the other clans; eventually, he came to the Mysterious Sky Clan’s territory and bumped into Han Tian, who cultivated the Fire Power Upanishad. Moreover, Han Tian hated the experts with Ice Power Upanishad a lot.

Although they didn’t have any grudge against each other, they had an earth-shaking battle. After that battle ended, the man the entire All-cold Snow Territory had idolized as the God of the Snow Land was wounded severely. He returned to All-cold Snow Territory, and hadn’t shown himself ever since.

That expert was called Xue Ye ( – lit. snowy night), and was the pride of all members of the Snow Tribe. Right here, this pair of brothers from the Snow Tribe were his sons, Xue Yuan ( – lit. snowfield) and Xue Feng ( – lit. snowy zenith.).

That year, when Xue Ye battled Han Tian, he was wounded and had helped create Han Tian’s fame. After he returned to All-cold Snow Territory, his territory was still burning. He knew he couldn’t save his life; thus, he decided to divide his God power into two parts and send it to his sons. His power thus created two new Territory Ancestor Realm experts for the Snow Tribe.

Xue Yuan and Xue Feng at the First Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm were the new hope and pride of the Snow Tribe. They decided to follow Sauron with the hope of restoring the Snow Tribe’s glory. They wanted to find Han Tian to take revenge. Coming through the Absolute Beginning Gateway, they wanted to find the Ice Power Upanishad Origin, which would push them to the higher realm on their path to the ultimate power.

Thus, on seeing the glacier, the appearance of the Ice Power Upanishad, that they were trying hard to find, they didn’t think much and just stormed forward.

Xue Yuan and Xue Feng swayed, turning into two Icy Frost Snow Dragons. The bright silver dragons roared and shrilled in the world of ice, their giant dragon horns turning into a massive icicle and stabbing toward Mei Ji.

The sharp ice column had reached Mei Ji despite the distance while the cold power expanded, as if it wanted to freeze and crack the entire sky. As Mei Ji also cultivated Ice power Upanishad, she sensed the cold aura and hissed coldly, “Your realm isn’t high enough!”

The void in front of Mei Ji’s chest was frozen into an icy jade at a speed naked eyes could observe. The two ice columns created by the dragon horns forcefully stabbed at her, but could only hit the icy jade.

Crack! Crack!

The ice columns broke into pieces and the Icy Frost Snow Dragons screeched, as if they got hit hard.

Mei Ji’s face was cold, her eyes sparkling in the world of howling snowy wind. “Members of the Snow Tribe, you guys are the geniuses cultivating the Ice Power Upanishad. No wonder why you guys could come here without an Original Symbol. Unfortunately, your realm isn’t high enough. You dare to vie for the Ice Power Upanishad Origin? Are you dreaming?”

Crack! Crack!

The ice blocks on Mei Ji’s body shattered, and the thousands of shattering ice shards turned into a tornado, swarming toward the two Icy Frost Snow Dragons.

Instantly, the silver body of the Ice Frost Snow Dragons had thousands of cuts on them. The pricking air got through the small cuts, stabbing into the two brothers’ Sea of Consciousness.

The Ice Frost Snow Dragons exploded into painful shrieks as the snowflakes flew and congregated into their bodies. The two Snow Tribe warriors next reappeared with so many cuts on their body.

The white, cold air fumed from the cuts. The two brothers shivered even though they cultivated Ice power Upanishad; they felt so cold as if their souls were going numb.

“Brother, she... she is at the Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm,” Xue Feng stuttered. Xue Yuan’s face was cold. He pondered for a while and then said, “We should use the two parts of cold energy father left us.”

“Brother!” Xue Feng screamed, his face changing.

“This is the only way to gain victory!”

Xue Yuan screeched while pounding on his chest. A cold light shot out of his heart, turning a crystal clear sword. The cold and sharp energy moving inside the sword made Xue Yuan numb.

Xue Feng was bewildered for a while. When he recognized that he couldn’t stop his brother, he didn’t hesitate anymore. From his heart, the same cold light shot out, strangely merging with Xue Yuan’s light.

Crack! Crack!

The two swords had merged into one, turning even more dazzling. It then formed an ice dragon, thrusting toward Mei Ji.

Mei Ji focused on the incoming attack, her charming face turning stern. She could see that this ice dragon had several thousand Icy Frost Snow Dragon souls sealed in it!

The Icy Frost Snow Dragons were the halidoms of the Snow Tribe. It was a kind of strange beast living in the All-cold Snow Territory. They were really mighty, and they could swallow the cold air to cultivate. The Icy Frost Snow Dragon were the guardians of the Snow Tribe for many generations while living in the All-cold Snow Territory.

Xue Yuan and Xue Feng had received their father’s cold power, which they had used to break through to the Territory Ancestor Realm. Afterward, they discovered the land where the souls of the Icy Frost Snow Dragon rested, and refined those souls into the two parts of cold energy they got.

Actually, they wanted to use the cold energy they inherited to deal with Han Tian. But at this moment, they had to use it for the Power Upanishad Origin.

Several thousand Icy Frost Snow Dragon souls contained the bone-chilling energy that was extremely terrifying and could be compared to the attack of an expert at the Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm. Mei Ji was at the Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm; seeing the ice dragon, she pondered for a short moment and realized that she couldn’t resist it.

Mei Ji gritted her teeth, plunging directly to the glacier like an ice arrow.

“She...What does she want to do?” Xue Feng was surprised, screaming. Xue Yuan couldn’t explain it either. He focused, getting a hold of himself. He sent more power to the dragon that had several thousand Icy Frost Snow Dragons sealed in it to chase Mei Ji further.

Strangely, Mei Ji”s body fell into the glacier and she disappeared quietly like a water drop in the vast sea.

The ice dragon created by the Icy Frost Snow Dragon souls was still roaring and howling. However, it halted uncontrollably before it could reach the glacier.

The dragon shivered in fear as if it knew that as soon as it got to that glacier, the thousands of Icy Frost Snow Dragon souls would perish shortly.

“Brother, why is that?” Xue Feng screamed as he didn’t get it. He poured more energy, but the ice dragon didn’t listen to him.

“I don’t know what is going on down there,” Xue Yuan was also bewildered.

While they were still befuddled and hesitant, a clone of Shi Yan arrived, appearing above the glacier.

The nine clones departed from the host body could vaguely feel Mei Ji, Emperor Sea Shark, and Montecie. Those who had received an Original Symbol from Shi Yan would have a magical connection with the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, which helped him locate Mei Ji and the others.

From that weak connection, when his nine clones flew away, they could travel the same routes Mei Ji and the others had chosen.

One of his clones had found Mei Ji. However, as soon as he arrived, the connection with her was cut off. He didn’t see Mei Ji around this glacier, but he saw Xue Yuan and Xue Feng.

Similarly, Xue Yuan and Xue Feng saw him. After they retrieved the ice dragon, they found a stranger appearing here. As a result, they immediately became vigilant as Xue Yuan asked, “Who are you?”

He couldn’t feel the cold aura from Shi Yan, so he knew that the latter didn’t cultivate the same power Upanishad. He was really hostile to Shi Yan.

“Who are you?” Shi Yan was surprised.

“We’re from the Snow Tribe. We’re here to find the Icy Frost Snow Dragon Power Upanishad Origin. You don’t cultivate the Ice power Upanishad. You’ve come to the wrong location. I hope we won’t disturb the other’s business,” said Xue Yuan. He couldn’t see through Shi Yan’s cultivation base. Although it was just a clone, since Shi Yan had reached the Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm, his clones were strong enough. Thus, Xue Yuan didn’t want to provoke more trouble.

“Who did you follow to get here?” Shi Yan got it shortly and he arched his brows. “Which group do you belong? Sauron’s, Yuan Zu’s, or Devouring Clan’s?”

Xue Yuan changed his face immediately, “You, which group do you belong to?”

“The group that came first,” Shi Yan grinned fiendishly.

“Who are you?” Xue Feng screamed in fear? “Are you Emperor Sea Shark or Forefather Dragon Lizard?”

Before they came here, Sauron had told them about Shi Yan’s companions. Hearing that he was from the group that had arrived in this place first, the two brothers knew that the situation wasn’t going well.

“You know a lot, don’t you?” Shi Yan smiled, “I’m the one who has opened the Absolute Beginning Gateway...I’m Shi Yan. I guess you came with Sauron, right?” While pausing, his face turned cold and he shouted, “Where’s Mei Ji? Before I got here, I could feel her aura around. Where’s she now?”

Xue Yuan and Xue Feng were shocked as they instinctively backed off, their faces grimaced.

Shi Yan’s name had been spread around the entire sea of stars. All warriors knew the meaning of his name: the most brutal God of Slaughter who had massacred the headquarters of the Soul Clan, Devouring Clan, Black Demon Clan, and Ancient Monster Clan. He had instigated the war between the Seven Great Clan. He had cast an eternal seal using two power Upanishads...

The description of Shi Yan flashed in their heads, making them feel bitter blame their bad luck.

” I ask you one more time...where is Mei Ji?” A malicious light sparked in Shi Yan’s eyes as he became impatient, walking on the void toward the brothers while shouting.

Xue Yuan and Xue Feng exchanged looks, then shouted and urged the ice dragon that had sealed several thousand Icy Frost Snow Dragon souls. They wanted to try their best to resist.
